payload.answer: Committed durable memories about Sam's employment change, music interests, interest in discussing AI infrastructure, and requested follow-up article. Any prior memory that Sam is still at Goldman should be treated as superseded.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam still listens to Bill Evans, and lately has been listening more to early Coltrane.
Sam is interested in catching up about AI infrastructure.
Sam asked Daniele to send an article related to their AI infrastructure catch-up.
